name: Basware
description: Basware — Global e-invoicing, AP automation and procure-to-pay platform with compliance in 70+ countries

seo.title: Basware — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Basware: Basware — Global e-invoicing, AP automation and procure-to-pay platform with compliance in 70+ countries

when_to_use: E-invoicing compliance for AP departments operating in 70+ countries
Automated purchase-to-pay workflow for enterprise procurement teams
Procure-to-pay automation with ERP integration (SAP, Oracle)
Global supplier invoice digitization and compliance reporting

pros: Strong AP automation with touchless invoice matching
Peppol access point and mandate-ready for EU CTC
Scales to enterprise AP volumes with SAP/Oracle hooks
cons: Pricing is enterprise-tier, not viable for SMBs
UI feels dated vs modern AP challengers
review.verdict: Battle-tested enterprise AP and e-invoicing suite — heavy but reliable for global compliance at scale.
review.best_for: Multinationals needing compliant e-invoicing and AP automation across many jurisdictions.
review.not_for: Startups or SMBs wanting fast self-serve onboarding and low setup cost.
